# 🚀 Feature Request

## 💡 Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are facing.

Example:
"I want to export chats as PDF directly without using external tools."

---

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

Describe what you want to happen.

---

## 🔄 Possible Implementation (Optional)

If you have technical ideas, mention them here.

---

## 📦 Use Case

Explain how this feature will help users.

---

## 📸 Mockups / Examples (Optional)

Add screenshots, diagrams, or examples.

---

## ⚡ Alternatives Considered

Any other solutions you thought about.

---

## 🙌 Additional Context

Anything else you want to add.
